title: Enemy/target cast bar
description: unit=target/focus Cast trigger. Deliberately OUTSIDE HUD_DESIGN.md's five fixed tiers - variable-count (0-N enemies), planned as a separate DynamicGroup module, not a fixed HUD slot. This template is a structural stub for that future module, not wired into Template_shadow.py.

spell_id_filter.description: Optional - restrict to specific dangerous casts; null shows any cast.

verified: Cast trigger with unit=target/focus confirmed directly in Prototypes.lua (line 7010) and Types.lua's actual_unit_types_cast. NOT built or live-tested - structural only, per WEAKAURA_INDEX.md's status for this row.
